productTitle: Ubiquiti UniFi Indoor Cable Cat6A CMR
name: Ubiquiti UniFi Indoor Cable Cat6A CMR
title: Ubiquiti UniFi Indoor Cable Cat6A CMR
description: The Ubiquiti UniFi Indoor Cable Cat6A CMR (UACC‑Cable‑C6A‑CMR) is designed for high-speed data transmission in demanding indoor network environments. With a 305 m length, this cable provides excellent coverage for offices, data centers, and enterprise installations. It features a solid bare copper conductor (23 AWG) for superior conductivity and reliability, while the anti‑crosstalk divider minimizes signal interference for consistent 10 Gbps Ethernet performance. The unshielded twisted pair (UTP) design simplifies installation without sacrificing speed or stability. Built with a durable PVC jacket (7.05 ± 0.2 mm diameter) and integrated ripcord, it offers easy handling and robust protection during deployment. Rated CMR (riser) for flame resistance, it supports safe installations in vertical spaces. Suitable for installation temperatures between 0°C and 60°C, it delivers dependable performance for professional networking setups. The UACC‑Cable‑C6A‑CMR ensures reliable high‑bandwidth connectivity for modern UniFi deployments. Engineered to meet Category 6A standards, it supports 10 GbE connections across long distances while maintaining low signal loss. Its solid copper cores provide durability and excellent signal quality, ideal for powering critical applications like VoIP, video streaming, and large data transfers. The UTP structure, combined with the anti‑crosstalk divider, reduces electromagnetic interference between pairs, ensuring clean, uninterrupted data flow. Flame‑retardant CMR rating allows use in riser spaces, meeting stringent safety standards for indoor use. With a 305 m spool, installers can efficiently run structured cabling in large buildings. Easy to pull, flexible to work with, and designed for professional environments, this Cat6A cable is the ideal choice for upgrading enterprise networks to handle next‑generation bandwidth demands.
